title: Affordable Hotel in Chur Old Town | Hotel Drei Könige · Since 1793
description: A family-run 3-star hotel in Chur's old town, Switzerland's oldest city. Individually furnished rooms from CHF 95/night. Free Wi-Fi, breakfast & bike storage. 7 min from station. Book direct for best rates.
ogImageAlt: Panoramic view of the historic old town of Chur, Switzerland, during the blue hour at dusk.
